name: Job Market Scanner
description: Scan job postings to understand market demand for specific roles

agents.name: Job Scanner
agents.purpose: Scan job boards for market intelligence
agents.system_prompt_hint: Search major job boards for the specified role. Analyze job titles, required skills, salary ranges, company types, and location trends. Note common requirements and nice-to-haves.

agents.name: Market Reporter
agents.purpose: Write a job market analysis report
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a job market report with: demand level, salary ranges, most-requested skills, top hiring companies, remote vs on-site trends, and career advice based on findings.

suggestion_card.title: Job Market Scanner
suggestion_card.subtitle: Understand demand for any role
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Scan the job market for [role] positions

author: agentfactory
